description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs on every pull request opened, synchronized, or reopened. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest with PostgreSQL service, running Python 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9. The job checks out the repository, creates a PostgreSQL database, installs OS and Python dependencies, caches Python dependencies, installs credentialdigger, downloads models, and runs unit, integration, and functional tests.
